title: Senate Races to Advance Crypto Legislation in July as Housing Bill Turmoil Threatens Timeline
summary: The Senate is racing to advance a major cryptocurrency bill in July, but the timeline is threatened by turmoil over a separate housing bill. The legislation could impact how crypto is regulated and taxed in the U.S.
body:
The U.S. Senate is facing a tight deadline to pass a comprehensive cryptocurrency bill, with lawmakers aiming to advance the legislation in July. The bill's path to passage is narrowing as pressure grows on the Senate to take it up next month, but delays and turmoil surrounding a separate housing bill are creating uncertainty about whether the crypto legislation can be passed before the summer recess.

The sweeping crypto bill, which has been in the works for months, includes key provisions such as defining digital assets as securities or commodities and establishing clear guidelines for tax reporting. However, the Senate's focus on the housing bill has created a threat to the timeline for the crypto legislation.

For everyday crypto users, this legislation could have significant implications. Clearer regulations could provide more certainty for investors and businesses operating in the crypto space, potentially leading to greater adoption and innovation. However, stricter rules could also impose additional compliance burdens.

The next few weeks will be critical. Lawmakers will need to navigate the competing priorities of the housing bill and the crypto legislation. Crypto enthusiasts and industry stakeholders should watch for any updates from the Senate, as the outcome could shape the future of digital asset regulation in the U.S. Read more → https://www.theblock.co/post/406231/senate-races-advance-crypto-legislation-housing-bill-turmoil-threatens-timeline?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
